moves.name: Imperial Decree Strike
moves.description: She extends her right arm forward with rigid precision, driving the stiffened tips of her red-lacquered nails in a focused spear-hand thrust at throat level, rotating her wrist sharply at full extension so the nails angle upward. Her left hand draws back flat against her ribs, gold thumb ring catching the light as a counterbalance to the strike.
moves.image_snapshot: Upright stance with weight shifted onto the left leg, right arm fully extended forward at throat height with fingers rigid and nails angled upward, wrist rotated outward, left hand flat against the left ribcage with elbow pulled back, torso facing forward, head level with eyes directed down the line of the extended arm. Speed lines on right forearm and fingertips.

moves.name: Phoenix Pin Flurry
moves.description: She reaches up with both hands, pulls the jade phoenix hairpin from her empress bun in a single motion, and unleashes a rapid six-hit combination of short stabbing strikes in alternating hands, each thrust aimed at pressure points across the upper body, moving forward in a tight advancing half-step with each hit.
moves.image_snapshot: Low forward stance with left foot leading, weight distributed 60 percent forward, right hand driving the hairpin straight ahead at shoulder height with elbow nearly locked, left hand cocked at chin level gripping a second position of the pin, torso angled 30 degrees forward, hair partially unraveled and falling across the right shoulder. Motion blur on both forearms and the hairpin tip.

moves.name: Jade Dragon Surge
moves.description: She plants her feet wide, throws her head back, and channels supernatural energy through the jade dragon tattoo, causing it to visibly writhe and glow green across her neck and right shoulder before she snaps her torso forward and thrusts her right palm outward, releasing a concentrated burst of jade-green force in a straight horizontal line from her palm.
moves.image_snapshot: Wide shoulder-width stance, both feet flat, right arm fully extended straight forward at chest height with palm facing out and fingers splayed, left arm pulled back behind the torso at hip level, torso pitched 15 degrees forward, head aligned with the extended arm, the jade dragon tattoo across the neck and right shoulder glowing with visible green light tracing its coiled outline. Speed lines radiating outward from the right palm.
